context: Evaluates whether the agent implements a correct Gatekeeper ConstraintTemplate Rego policy using the violation rule, input.review.object for the resource, and input.parameters for constraint configuration.

checklist.name: violation contains msg pattern
checklist.description: The policy uses `violation contains {"msg": msg} if { ... }` (Gatekeeper pattern), not `deny contains msg`

checklist.name: Uses input.review.object
checklist.description: The policy reads the resource from `input.review.object` (Gatekeeper), not `input.request.object` (kube-mgmt)

checklist.name: Uses input.parameters for required labels
checklist.description: The required labels are read from `input.parameters` rather than hardcoded in the policy

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
